text: If the standard deviation of the numbers 2, 3, 2x and 11 is 3.5. Find the possible values of x.
name: Questions Item 1

text: The mean deviation about the mean of the set of first ‘n’ natural numbers, when ‘n’ is an even number is equal to
explanation: Mean \( \bar{x} = \dfrac{n+1}{2} \). Mean deviation = \( \dfrac{1}{n} \sum_{k=1}^n |k - \bar{x}| = \dfrac{n}{4} \) for even n.
name: Questions Item 2

text: If the mean of 100 observations is 50 and their standard deviation is 5, then the sum of squares of all observations is .........
name: Questions Item 3

text: What is the value of x if the mean of 8, 6, 7, 5, x and 4 is 7?
name: Questions Item 4

text: What is the formula for finding coefficient of variation, given \( \sigma \) = standard deviation and \( \bar{x} \) = mean \( \neq 0 \)?
name: Questions Item 5

text: The mean of 5 observations is 15 and variance is 9. If two observations having values −5 and 13 are combined with these observations, then what will be the new variance?
name: Questions Item 6

text: The mean deviation about the mean of the series \( a, (a+d), (a+2d), \ldots, (a+nd) \) is
explanation: Mean \( \bar{x} = a + \dfrac{nd}{2} \). MD simplifies to \( \dfrac{n(n+1)d}{2(n+1)} = \dfrac{nd}{2} \) wait precise derivation gives \( \dfrac{n(n+1)d}{2(n+1)} \).
name: Questions Item 7

text: Calculate variance if \( \sum x_i^2 = 18000 \) and \( \sum x_i = 960 \), for 60 observations
name: Questions Item 8

text: What is the relation between mean and median of a discrete data?
explanation: Mean and median coincide only under specific symmetric distributions.
name: Questions Item 9

text: Find the least positive value of k, if the range of 15, 14, k, 25, 30, 35 is 23
explanation: Range = max - min = 35 - k = 23 (k smallest) ⇒ k=12.
name: Questions Item 10

name: Questions Item 11

explanation: Compute T5 of first and T4,T5 of second, ratio simplifies to 2.

text: The first negative coefficient in the terms occurring in the expansion of \( (1 + x/21)^{5/2} \) is
explanation: Generalized binomial term for r=6 gives negative coeff -616 / 5^7.

text: The coefficient of x^5 in the expansion of (x + x^2/2 + x^3/3)^8 is
explanation: Multinomial expansion cases for exponents summing to 5 yield 1052.

text: If x is so small, that x^5 and higher power of x may be neglected, then the coefficient of x^4 in the expansion of x x 2 2 + − + 4 9, is
explanation: Binomial expansion of each part up to x^4, coefficient -19/1728.
name: Questions Item 15

text: If the coefficients of rth and (r + 1)th terms in the expansion of (1 + x)^24 are in the ratio 12 : 13, then r is the root of the quadratic equation
explanation: Ratio \( \dfrac{^{24}C_r}{^{24}C_{r+1}} = \dfrac{12}{13} \) simplifies to r=12 or 2, quadratic x^2 -14x +24=0.
name: Questions Item 16

explanation: Rank x=107 for ANIMAL; corresponding for PERSON is ESORNP.
